summary: Plan-only remediation assessment: no GitHub mutations, no merge recommendations because no candidate has complete merge preflight with Codex /review proof. The prior fix_needed placeholders were downgraded to non-mutating keep_related actions because the result did not include a complete executable fix_artifact. Security-sensitive linked refs are quarantined separately.
